title: You Deleted Everything and AWS Is Still Charging You
summary: A tutorial addressing hidden AWS charges that persist after resource deletion, such as RDS snapshots, EBS volumes, elastic IPs, and NAT gateways. The video provides a cleanup checklist and demonstrates billing alarm setup to prevent unexpected charges.
